description: Evermesh node desktop client: app-data filesystem access for the pin store (pins.sqlite3) and cached/pinned media blobs, HTTP egress for the user-configured gateway(s) this instance browses, and native open/save dialogs for identity/export flows. Every actual HTTP call and every file read/write happens in Rust (src/gateway_client.rs, src/pinning.rs) — the webview only reaches these through `invoke()`; this file is the outer boundary in case that ever changes.
